proof: function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real) { (exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or not continuous_condition(x0, x1, x2, k0) } } or continuous_at(x0, x1)) = continuous_condition_imp_continuous_at(x0, x1) }(f, x)
function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real) { forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(x0, x1, k0, x2) } } = continuous_at(x0, x1) }(f, x)

goal: continuous_at(g, x) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_positive implies exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(g, x, k0, x0) } }
proof: function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real) { forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(x0, x1, k0, x2) } } = continuous_at(x0, x1) }(g, x)

goal: continuous_at(f, g(x)) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_positive implies exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, g(x), k0, x0) } }
proof: function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real) { forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(x0, x1, k0, x2) } } = continuous_at(x0, x1) }(f, g(x))

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, g(x), k0, eps) }
proof: continuous_at(f, g(x))
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, g(x), k0, x0) } } = true)
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or not continuous_condition(f, g(x), x1, x0) }) }(eps)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(g, x, k0, delta1) }
proof: delta1.is_positive
continuous_at(g, x)
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(g, x, k0, x0) } } = true)
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or not continuous_condition(g, x, x1, x0) }) }(delta1)

goal: continuous_condition(g, x, delta2, delta1) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_close(x, delta2) implies g(x0).is_close(g(x), delta1) }
proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real -> Real, x3: Real) { forall(x4: Real) { not x4.is_close(x0, x1) or x2(x4).is_close(x2(x0), x3) } = continuous_condition(x2, x0, x1, x3) }(x, delta2, g, delta1)

goal: continuous_condition(f, g(x), delta1, eps) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_close(g(x), delta1) implies f(x0).is_close(f(g(x)), eps) }
proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real -> Real, x3: Real) { forall(x4: Real) { not x4.is_close(x0, x1) or x2(x4).is_close(x2(x0), x3) } = continuous_condition(x2, x0, x1, x3) }(g(x), delta1, f, eps)
continuous_condition(g, x, delta2, delta1)
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta2) or g(x0).is_close(g(x), delta1) } = true)
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, delta2) and not g(x0).is_close(g(x), delta1)) }(x1)
continuous_condition(f, g(x), delta1, eps)
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(g(x), delta1) or f(x0).is_close(f(g(x)), eps) } = true)
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(g(x), delta1) and not f(x0).is_close(f(g(x)), eps)) }(g(x1))
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x2: T0 -> T1, x3: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x2, x3) = x0(x2(x3)) }[Real, Real, Real](f, g, x1)
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x2: T0 -> T1, x3: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x2, x3) = x0(x2(x3)) }[Real, Real, Real](f, g, x)

goal: compose(f, g, x1).is_close(compose(f, g, x), eps)
continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, delta2, eps)
proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real -> Real, x3: Real) { forall(x4: Real) { not x4.is_close(x0, x1) or x2(x4).is_close(x2(x0), x3) } = continuous_condition(x2, x0, x1, x3) }(x, delta2, compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), eps)
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_close(x, delta2) and not compose(f, g, w0).is_close(compose(f, g, x), eps) }
function(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta2) or compose(f, g, x0).is_close(compose(f, g, x), eps) }(w0)

goal: continuous_condition(h, x, delta2, eps) = continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, delta2, eps)
proof: compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g) != h
compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g) = h

goal: delta2.is_positive and continuous_condition(h, x, delta2, eps)
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(h, x, k0, eps) }
proof: function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and continuous_condition(h, x, x0, eps)) }(delta2)
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_positive and forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or not continuous_condition(h, x, x0, w0) } }
function(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(h, x, k0, x0) } }(w0)
w0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or not continuous_condition(h, x, x1, w0) }
let w1: Real satisfy { w1.is_positive and continuous_condition(h, x, w1, w0) }
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and continuous_condition(h, x, x0, w0)) }(w1)

not continuous_at(g, x + Real.0)

function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real) { not continuous(x0) or continuous_at(x0, x1) }(g, x + Real.0)

continuous(f)
not continuous_at(f, g(x) + Real.0)

function(x0: Real -> Real) { forall(x1: Real) { continuous_at(x0, x1) } = continuous(x0) }(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g))
let w0: Real satisfy { not continuous_at(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), w0) }
function(x0: Real) { continuous_at(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x0) }(w0)

goal: continuous_at(f, x) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_positive implies exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x, k0, x0) } }

continuous_at(g, x)

proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real -> Real, x3: Real) { forall(x4: Real) { not x4.is_close(x0, x1) or x2(x4).is_close(x2(x0), x3) } = continuous_condition(x2, x0, x1, x3) }(x, delta, add_fns[Real](f, g), eps)
